text:
Market today: Fed rate hike bets scaling back and continued AI investment are providing a positive backdrop for your tech and chip names.

Your holdings: SOXL (-28.7%) and SPAL (-9.58%) are leveraged ETFs needing immediate attention due to significant drawdowns; remember margin amplifies these drops. QQQI (-1.86%) is on 'TRIM' status.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader market's reaction to Fed sentiment shifts and monitor SMH for its scanner-indicated entry.

Bottom line: Focus on risk management for your leveraged positions and look for stable entry points in core tech.
plays: SOXL: Your -28.7% loss and 'SELL' status on this leveraged ETF is critical. Re-evaluate your default stop at 200, as it's currently above the price of 181.47.
SPAL: This new leveraged ETF is already down -9.58%. Given its volatility and decay, ensure your stop at 21.38 is respected to limit further drawdown.
SMH: Consider adding to your SMH position if it reaches the scanner's entry zone of 586.43-584.71, with a stop at 580.88.
